title: hieracium subvillosum
intro: Hieracium subvillosum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family, known for its tall stem and bright yellow flowers. The plant is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects, which are often used to treat conditions such as arthritis and urinary tract infections. It is also valued for its potential health benefits, including reducing fever and relieving digestive issues, due to its bitter compounds that stimulate digestion. Hieracium subvillosum is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil, and may be used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
